baseline_reference.method: mean of bracketing baseline medians/semantic aggregates

experiment: B300 GLM-5.2 FP8 one-request kernel-MFU backend A/B
precision_rule: FP8 TRT-LLM Q/K/V scan x1; BF16 FlashMLA attention MMA x2; scalar, SFU, and unresolved work remains unconverted
